title: Enterprise Breach Prevention
challenge: Prevented sophisticated APT attack targeting 10,000+ employees
solution: Implemented advanced threat detection and response system

title: Ransomware Recovery Program
challenge: Recovered from repeated ransomware attempts and outdated backups
solution: Implemented immutable backup strategy and segmented recovery playbooks
result: Restored operations 64% faster after simulated outages

title: Secure SDLC Transformation
challenge: Shift security left without slowing delivery cycles
solution: Embedded SAST, dependency checks, and release gates into CI/CD
result: Critical vulnerabilities reduced by 91% in six months

title: Identity Governance Refresh
challenge: Manual access reviews across thousands of employees and vendors
solution: Automated identity lifecycle workflows and access certifications
result: Cut review time from weeks to days

title: SOC Modernization Initiative
challenge: Fragmented monitoring tools slowed detection and escalation
solution: Unified alerts into a modern SIEM and tuned triage automation
result: Mean time to detect dropped by 73%

title: Third-Party Risk Program
challenge: No standard process for assessing supplier security posture
solution: Deployed risk scoring, questionnaire workflows, and remediation tracking
metrics: 200+ suppliers onboarded to the new process
